hero.title: Right now at home
hero.usageAriaLabel: Today's usage, see usage page for details
hero.familyEmpty: No family members yet · Tap "Family" on the left to add family members
hero.cameraOfflineTitle: Cameras detected in Xiaomi Home, but miloco's perception engine can't connect yet
hero.cameraOfflineHint: The backend may not be on the same LAN as the cameras, or the cameras haven't enabled LAN mode. After checking the network, try restarting miloco or the cameras.
hero.cameraEmpty: No cameras at home yet · Connect Xiaomi Home cameras to see them here
hero.noStreaming: No cameras perceiving yet, enable one to start
hero.benchTitleFull: Maxed out at {{n}} cameras, disable one to enable another
hero.toggleTitleInUse: miloco is using this one · Tap to disable
hero.toggleTitleNotInUse: miloco isn't using this one · Tap to enable
hero.voiceTitleOn: Audio pickup on: this camera's sound is processed by perception · Tap to turn off
hero.voiceTitleOff: Audio pickup off: this camera's sound is never processed (no transcription, nothing sent to the cloud) · Tap to turn on
hero.voiceTitleDisabled: Camera perception is off, can't set audio pickup
